rationale: Ukraine continues active strikes on Russian energy infrastructure — war at maximum background level; US attention remains divided with Iran deal still unresolved, keeping Western focus fragmented.

top_events.title: Ukraine keeps targeting Russian energy after hitting sea terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued strikes on Russian energy infrastructure signal active offensive operations — directly relevant to war dynamics and morale for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal still unresolved — US attention divided
top_events.summary: Ongoing Iran negotiations keep US diplomatic focus split, potentially delaying or diluting Western support decisions for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Iran deal talks continue
top_events.summary: Israeli strikes on Lebanon amid Iran deal talks could complicate or accelerate the deal — indirect effect on US-Iran dynamics that shape Western attention toward Ukraine.
